signIn.title: Sign in to Paperclip
signIn.description: Use your email and password to access this instance.

signUp.title: Create your Paperclip account
signUp.description: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.

fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.

approved.title: CLI access approved
approved.description: The Paperclip CLI can now finish authentication on the requesting machine.

cliAuth.retry: Start the CLI auth flow again from your terminal to generate a new approval request.
cliAuth.signInDescription: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to approve the CLI access request.
cliAuth.approveDescription: A local Paperclip CLI process is requesting board access to this instance.
cliAuth.failedToUpdate: Failed to update CLI auth challenge
cliAuth.adminRequired: This challenge requires instance-admin access. Sign in with an instance admin account to approve it.

claimed.title: Board ownership claimed
claimed.description: This instance is now linked to your authenticated user.

boardClaim.signInDescription: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to claim Board ownership.
boardClaim.title: Claim Board ownership
boardClaim.description: This will promote your user to instance admin and migrate company ownership access from local trusted mode.
